competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Chadi Riad.
Foul by Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands).
Attempt blocked. Ryan Gravenberch (Netherlands) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked.

events.description: 赫拉芬贝赫射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ryan Gravenberch (Netherlands).
Foul by Ismael Saibari (Morocco).
Foul by Issa Diop (Morocco).
Chadi Riad (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Netherlands. Crysencio Summerville is caught offside.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Micky van de Ven.

Attempt saved. Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco) header from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Achraf Hakimi with a cross.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Neil El Aynaoui Shot On Target

events.description: 尼尔·艾纳维射正。 阿什拉夫·哈基米参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ayyoub Bouaddi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Azzedine Ounahi following a corner.

events.description: 阿尤布·布阿迪射门偏出。 阿泽丁·欧纳济参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the top right corner by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Ismael Saibari.

events.description: 阿什拉夫·哈基米射正。 赛巴里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Bart Verbruggen.

events.description: 摩洛哥点球大战3-2胜出，常规/加时比分1-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco).
Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Ismael Saibari (Morocco).
Offside, Netherlands. Denzel Dumfries is caught offside.
Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Noussair Mazraoui.
Attempt blocked. Denzel Dumfries (Netherlands) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Crysencio Summerville with a cross.

events.description: 邓弗里斯射门被封堵。 克里森西奥·萨默维尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Noussair Mazraoui.
Delay in match because of an injury Jan Paul van Hecke (Netherlands).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Cody Gakpo (Netherlands).
Attempt missed. Micky van de Ven (Netherlands) left footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Crysencio Summerville.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Micky van de Ven Shot Off Target

events.description: 米奇·范德文射门偏出。 克里森西奥·萨默维尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Yassine Bounou.
Yassine Bounou (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Issa Diop (Morocco).
Issa Diop (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt saved. Micky van de Ven (Netherlands) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Yassine Bounou (Morocco). Assisted by Jan Paul van Hecke with a headed pass.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Micky van de Ven Shot On Target

events.description: 米奇·范德文射正。 扬·保罗·范赫克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses the top left corner. Assisted by Neil El Aynaoui following a fast break.

events.description: 阿泽丁·欧纳济射门偏出。 尼尔·艾纳维参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ayyoub Bouaddi (Morocco) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi.

events.description: 阿尤布·布阿迪射门偏出。 阿什拉夫·哈基米参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Ayyoub Bouaddi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Azzedine Ounahi with a through ball.

events.description: 阿什拉夫·哈基米射门被封堵。 阿泽丁·欧纳济参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Netherlands. Brian Brobbey is caught offside.
Attempt saved. Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands).
qualifiers.espnShortText: Bilal El Khannouss Shot On Targe

events.description: 比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯射正。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ryan Gravenberch (Netherlands) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 赫拉芬贝赫射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Ismael Saibari (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Virgil van Dijk.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Bart Verbruggen.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Denzel Dumfries.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Frenkie de Jong.
Foul by Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, Netherlands. Teun Koopmeiners replaces Nathan Aké.

events.description: 特恩·库普迈纳斯替补登场，换下内森·阿克。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Netherlands. Wout Weghorst replaces Brian Brobbey.

events.description: 沃特·韦霍斯特替补登场，换下布罗贝。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Netherlands 1, Morocco 0. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Crysencio Summerville.
Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Substitution, Morocco. Anass Salah-Eddine replaces Chadi Riad because of an injury.

events.description: 阿纳斯·萨拉赫·艾丁替补登场，换下查迪·里亚德。

qualifiers.espnText: Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Jan Paul van Hecke.
Attempt blocked. Anass Salah-Eddine (Morocco) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 阿纳斯·萨拉赫·艾丁射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Morocco. Gessime Yassine replaces Brahim Díaz.

events.description: 盖西姆·亚辛替补登场，换下布拉欣·迪亚斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Ayyoub Bouaddi.

events.description: 萨米尔·穆拉贝特替补登场，换下阿尤布·布阿迪。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Ryan Gravenberch (Netherlands).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Ismael Saibari (Morocco).
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Azzedine Ounahi.

events.description: 苏菲安·拉希米替补登场，换下阿泽丁·欧纳济。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Netherlands. Jorrel Hato replaces Micky van de Ven.

events.description: 乔雷尔·哈托替补登场，换下米奇·范德文。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Netherlands. Quinten Timber replaces Ryan Gravenberch.

events.description: 昆顿木业替补登场，换下赫拉芬贝赫。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Morocco. Chemsdine Talbi replaces Bilal El Khannouss.

events.description: 凯姆斯丁·塔尔比替补登场，换下比拉尔·艾尔·汉努斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Issa Diop.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Netherlands 1, Morocco 1. Issa Diop (Morocco) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Chemsdine Talbi with a cross.

events.description: 伊萨·迪奥普破门。 比分 1-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Foul by Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Anass Salah-Eddine (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Ismael Saibari (Morocco).

Attempt saved. Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Ismael Saibari with a through ball.

events.description: 苏菲安·拉希米射正。 赛巴里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Morocco. Conceded by Bart Verbruggen.
Foul by Anass Salah-Eddine (Morocco).

events.description: 阿纳斯·萨拉赫·艾丁犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half ends, Netherlands 1, Morocco 1.
Foul by Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Fourth official has announced 0 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时5分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Gessime Yassine (Morocco) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Anass Salah-Eddine (Morocco).

events.description: 阿纳斯·萨拉赫·艾丁犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Netherlands. Marten de Roon replaces Frenkie de Jong.

events.description: 马丁·德隆替补登场，换下德容。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Neil El Aynaoui (Morocco).
Substitution, Netherlands. Justin Kluivert replaces Cody Gakpo.

events.description: 贾斯汀·克鲁伊维特替补登场，换下加克波。

qualifiers.espnText: Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Delay in match because of an injury Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Chemsdine Talbi (Morocco) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Fourth official has announced 1 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

officials.name: 克里斯蒂安·马塞洛·加雷·雷耶斯
